_comment: Copy to ~/.nanobot/principals.json and fill in for your family.
`id` is used in policy.yaml as the actor value.
`identities.sender_id` is the unique id in each channel (Telegram: numeric id; VK: numeric user id).

`memx_key` MUST be unique per principal. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`. The same key must be added to memx-config/acl.json with the appropriate scope grants. Two principals sharing a memx_key will refuse to load — the registry fails loud.
